SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.rightpanel

Class MeasurementsManager

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.rightpanel.MeasurementsManager
public class MeasurementsManager extends Object
Provides measurements management operations. Indirectly used by the LDC PreprocessingPanel UI class.

  • Method Details

    • createMeasuresPreviewWorker

      public SwingWorker<ij.ImagePlus,Void> createMeasuresPreviewWorker(AnalysisSettings settings, ij.ImagePlus img)
      Creates a SwingWorker, that take care of processing and showing the measurements preview.
      Parameters:
      settings - The plugin settings.
      img - The current image to consider.
      See Also:
      • MeasuresPreviewWorker

    • createMeasuresProcessingWorker

      public SwingWorker<ij.measure.ResultsTable,Void> createMeasuresProcessingWorker(AnalysisSettings settings, ij.ImagePlus img, ij.ImagePlus binaryImg)
      Creates a SwingWorker, that take care of processing measurements and showing them.
      Parameters:
      settings - The plugin settings.
      img - The current image to consider.
      binaryImg - The binary mask of the current image.
      See Also:
      • MeasuresProcessingWorker

    • exportResultsTable

      public void exportResultsTable(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt, String path)
      Export as a CSV file the table passed in parameter.
      Parameters:
      rt - The ResultsTable to export as a CSV file.
      path - The path of the file as a String.

    • calculateSummaryTable

      public ij.measure.ResultsTable calculateSummaryTable(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt)
      Calculate the summary ResultTable generated by ImageJ.
      Parameters:
      rt - The ResultsTable to generate statistics from.
      Returns:
      The ResultsTable containing the statistics.

    • addStatisticsRows

      private void addStatisticsRows(ij.measure.ResultsTable summaryRt, ij.measure.ResultsTable rt, List<Integer> rows, String sliceLabel, String[] headings, Set<String> ignoredCols)
      Helper method to calculate statistics and add the summary rows for a given set of rows.
      Parameters:
      summaryRt - The Result Table of the summary to add rows to.
      rt - The Result Table to generate statistics from.
      rows - The set of rows to generate summary.
      sliceLabel - The slice to generate summary.
      headings - The headings of the summary table.
      ignoredCols - The set of columns to ignore.

    • generateHistograms

      public List<ij.ImagePlus> generateHistograms(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt)
      Generate a list containing histograms for each columns of the ResultsTable.
      Parameters:
      rt - ResultsTable to generated histograms from.
      Returns:
      List that contain ImagePlus Object of histograms for each column of the table.
